---
title: "theater_exploration"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(maps)
library(ggplot2)
library(sf)
library(leaflet)
library(ggplot2)
```


```{r}
nrhp <- read_csv("../data/Theaters/NRHP_all_theater_types_geocoded.csv")
lhat <- read_csv("../data/Theaters/LHAT_theaters.csv")
opera <- read_csv("../data/Theaters/opera_america_members.csv")
```
## EDA Graphs
```{r}
# Theater count by state
ggplot(nrhp %>%
         count(State, sort = TRUE) %>%
         slice_max(n, n = 15), aes(reorder(State, n), n, fill = State)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Top 15 States with the Most Historic Theaters (NRHP)",
    y = "State",
    x = "Number of Historic Theaters"
  )

# Opera count by state
ggplot(opera %>%
         count(state, sort = TRUE) %>%
         slice_max(n, n = 15),aes(reorder(state, n), n, fill = state)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Top 15 States with the Most Operas (Opera America)",
    y = "State",
    x = "Number of Operas"
  )
```

```{r}
# clean and add 'source' column to each dataset
nrhp_map <- nrhp %>%
  mutate(
    name = `Property Name`,
    city = City,
    state = State,
    latitude = latitude,
    longitude = longitude,
    source = "NRHP",
    .keep = "none"
  )

lhat_map <- lhat %>%
  mutate(
    name = theatre,
    city = city,
    state = state,
    latitude = latitude,
    longitude = longitude,
    source = "LHAT",
    .keep = "none"
  )

opera_map <- opera %>%
  mutate(
    name = name,
    city = city,
    state = state,
    latitude = latitude,
    longitude = longitude,
    source = "Opera America",
    .keep = "none"
  )

# join all cleaned datasets
all_theatres <- bind_rows(nrhp_map, lhat_map, opera_map)
```


```{r}
# Record count of each dataset
source_counts <- all_theatres %>%
  count(source, sort = TRUE)

ggplot(source_counts, aes(x = source, y = n, fill = source)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(
    title = "Number of Theatre Records by Dataset",
    x = "Dataset",
    y = "Number of records"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
# Distribution of NRHP locations by level of significance

significance_counts <- nrhp %>%
  select(starts_with("Level of Significance")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    everything(),
    names_to = "level",
    values_to = "present"
  ) %>%
  filter(present == TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    level = sub("Level of Significance - ", "", level)
  ) %>%
  count(level)

ggplot(significance_counts, aes(x = reorder(level, n), y = n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "maroon") +
  labs(
    title = "NRHP Theatre Listings by Level of Significance",
    x = "Level of Significance",
    y = "Number of Theatres"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```


## NRHP State-level Choropleth
```{r}
# count the number of theaters by state
state_counts <- nrhp %>%
  count(State, name = "total_theatres") %>%
  mutate(region = str_to_lower(State))

# get state map shapes
states_map <- map_data("state")

# join counts to the map
states_theatres <- states_map %>%
  left_join(state_counts, by = "region") %>%
  mutate(total_theatres = replace_na(total_theatres, 0))
```

```{r}
# Choropleth map of NRHP theaters across the US by state
ggplot(states_theatres, aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group)) +
  geom_polygon(aes(fill = total_theatres), color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  coord_fixed(1.3) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma") +
  theme_void() +
  labs(
    title = "Number of NRHP Theatres by State",
    fill = "Theatres"
  )
```


## All Theaters Leaflet
```{r}
# remove any rows without coordinates
all_theatres_clean <- all_theatres %>%
  filter(!is.na(latitude), !is.na(longitude))
```

```{r}
# convert to spatial data 
all_theatres_sf <- all_theatres_clean %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = 4326
  )
```

```{r}
# creating leaflet spatial map of theaters/opera houses from each dataset
leaflet(all_theatres_sf) %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = filter(all_theatres_sf, source == "NRHP"),
    radius = 3,
    color = "green",
    stroke = FALSE,
    fillOpacity = 0.8,
    group = "NRHP",
    popup = ~paste0(name, "<br>", city, ", ", state)
  ) %>%
  
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = filter(all_theatres_sf, source == "LHAT"),
    radius = 3,
    color = "blue",
    stroke = FALSE,
    fillOpacity = 0.8,
    group = "LHAT",
    popup = ~paste0(name, "<br>", city, ", ", state)
  ) %>%
  
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = filter(all_theatres_sf, source == "Opera America"),
    radius = 3,
    color = "red",
    stroke = FALSE,
    fillOpacity = 0.8,
    group = "Opera America",
    popup = ~paste0(name, "<br>", city, ", ", state)
  ) %>%
  
  addLayersControl(
    overlayGroups = c("NRHP", "LHAT", "Opera America"),
    options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE)
  )
```
